testcase.name: verifyProductSearchExecution
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.name: search, but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":"*[name='search']"}.
